name: The-Red-Wagon-Training-Program_Workbook-2.pdf
html:
THE RED WAGON
TRAINING PROGRAM
Copley Square
🛒

Welcome, Future Leader.

You have been identified as a knowledgeable, valuable, and capable member of our team. This program is designed to empower you as a Certified Trainer.

Winning Hearts Every Day

Duration: 3 Sessions
Goal: Become a Certified Trainer

Phase 1: Suitability & Eligibility

Before we pull the wagon, we must ensure the wheels are secure. Confirm the following:

Day 1: Culture & Hospitality

Our Corporate Purpose: "To Glorify God by being a faithful steward..."

The Core 4 (Tap to Reveal)

Hospitality is about creating a moment. Tap the cards to review the Core 4 behaviors.

👁️
Eye Contact
Share a look.
Acknowledge their presence immediately.
😊
Smile
Share a smile.
Warm and welcoming.
🗣️
Speak
Speak enthusiastically.
Tone matters!
🤝
Connect
Stay connected.
Make it personal.

2nd Mile Service

What is one way you can go the "2nd Mile" today?

Day 2: Leadership

Understanding the difference between Teaching, Training, and Coaching.

Coaching
Training
Teaching

Tap the pyramid levels to learn more.

Scenario Check

A Team Member is making a shake but puts syrup on the bottom (incorrectly). What do you do?

Day 3: Procedures

Consistency is key. We use OneClick and Passports to track training.

Rule: If a trainee is < 10 mins late, prepare. If 10+ mins late, tell Shift Lead.

Test Your Knowledge: Order of Training

Click items to swap them into the correct order (1-3).

  • 2. Window
  • 3. Orientation
  • 1. Team Member Basics

Certified Trainer

Presented to

In recognition of your dedication to Winning Hearts Every Day and desire to help develop future Remarkable Leaders.
